login.title: Sign In
login.validation_email_pattern: Please include an “@” in the email address.
login.toast_enter_email_password_create: Enter your email and password to create an account.
login.toast_agency_missing: agency_id missing. Set VITE_DEFAULT_AGENCY_ID for level-4 account creation.
login.toast_account_created: Account created. Check your email if confirmation is enabled.
login.error_user_id_missing: User ID not returned by Supabase after sign-up.

register.title: Create Account
register.name: Full name
register.terms: I accept the terms and conditions

register_saas.hint_formats: JPEG, PNG or WebP · max 2 MB
register_saas.toast_format_invalid: Unsupported format. Use JPEG, PNG or WebP.
register_saas.toast_file_too_large: File too large (max 2 MB before compression).
register_saas.toast_compression_failed: Could not compress image. Try another file.
register_saas.toast_avatar_later: Photo not saved—you can update it later.
register_saas.toast_confirm_email: Account created! Check your email to activate your account.
register_saas.error_duplicate_email: This email address is already in use.
register_saas.camera_denied: Camera access denied. Allow the camera in your browser settings.
register_saas.camera_unavailable: Camera not available on this device.

register_visitor.hint_email_check: We check whether your email already exists
register_visitor.link_login_combined: Already have an account? Sign in
register_visitor.fp_consent_register: I accept a technical anonymous identifier (FingerprintJS) to link this signup to my session, stored locally and in my account metadata.
register_visitor.fp_consent_register_hint: Without this, signup still works; anonymous tracking uses the usual visitor id.
register_visitor.pool_avatar_shuffle_limit: {{max}} vorgeschlagene Avatare: wischen zum Auswählen oder Selfie aufnehmen.
register_visitor.toast_blend_failed: Portraits konnten nicht zusammengeführt werden. Bitte erneut versuchen.
register_visitor.dialog_duplicate_desc: This email is already in use. Forgot your password? Reset it?
register_visitor.toast_password_min: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.
register_visitor.toast_complete_email_password: Incomplete sign-in details. Go back to step 1.
register_visitor.toast_phone_invalid: Phone number is invalid for the selected country.
register_visitor.toast_test_bypass: Test mode: direct entry without authentication.
register_visitor.toast_auto_sign_in_failed: Account created but automatic sign-in failed.
register_visitor.error_duplicate_email_signup: This email address is already in use.
register_visitor.error_password_short_signup: Password too short: at least {{min}} characters.
register_visitor.oauth_step2_hint: Angemeldet mit {{email}} — vervollständigen Sie Ihr Besucherprofil.
register_visitor.toast_oauth_failed: OAuth-Anmeldung fehlgeschlagen. Erneut versuchen oder E-Mail und Passwort nutzen.

returning_anonymous.greeting: Na so was, <pseudo>{{pseudo}}</pseudo>! Sie sind zurück?
returning_anonymous.subtitle: Willkommen!
returning_anonymous.hint_identity: Bitte geben Sie unten Ihre Identität ein
returning_anonymous.hint_new_avatars: Anschließend können Sie einen von 3 neuen Avataren wählen

reset_password.title: Reset Password
reset_password.success: If an account exists for this email, you will receive a link to choose a new password.
reset_password.success_short: A password reset email has been sent. Check your inbox.

recovery.invalid_link: Invalid or expired link. Request a new one from the sign-in page (“Forgot password”).
recovery.card_description: Choose a password different from your old one. If you still remember your old password, enter it below—it must not match the new password.
recovery.previous_placeholder: To confirm it differs from the new password
recovery.toast_min_length: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.
recovery.toast_confirm_mismatch: The two new password fields do not match.
recovery.toast_same_as_previous: The new password must differ from the old one.
recovery.toast_updated: Password updated. You can sign in.
